summary: Iteration 4 frontend-only responsive testing complete. Verified at mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024) and desktop (1920x800) viewports as ADMIN. All 9 responsive layout fixes work as specified. CRITICAL regression (Depot order detail pick-pill overlapping description text) is FULLY FIXED: on mobile 6/6 sampled lines of CMD 56747 show pill stacked below description+metadata with zero overlap; pill still tappable and increments correctly (0/2 -> 1/2 verified). Sidebar off-canvas drawer works flawlessly on <lg (mobile AND tablet 768): translate-x-full by default (x=-288), hamburger (data-testid sidebar-menu-button) visible, opens with translate-x-0 and shows overlay, overlay-click and X button both close, and clicking any NavLink navigates + auto-closes drawer. On lg+ (1920) sidebar is statically visible at x=0 (width=256) and hamburger has display:none. Zero horizontal-overflow on all 9 major pages at 390px (Dashboard, Stock, Caisse, Interventions, Devis, Reprises, Communication, Admin Users, Admin Shops). Stock/Interventions/Devis/Reprises/Users tables scroll horizontally inside overflow-x-auto wrapper. Search+action-button rows stack vertically (search at y=89, button at y=137). Intervention form on mobile shows single-column grid (326px = 1 col). DocumentHeader wraps cleanly. Reprise form on tablet still displays phone diagrams (Avant/Arrière) side by side. No console errors beyond the expected 401 during initial auth check.
test_report_links: /app/.screenshots/m_depot_56747.png (mobile depot detail — pill stacked below text, CRITICAL fix visual proof)
/app/.screenshots/t_reprise_form.png (tablet reprise with phone diagrams side by side)
/app/.screenshots/m_int_form.png, m_caisse2.png, m_stock.png, m_int.png, m_devis.png, m_reprises.png, m_users.png, m_shops.png, m_comm.png
action_items: None — all 9 responsive fixes verified working end-to-end. Main agent can ship this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx cleanly manages sidebarOpen state via useState; Sidebar receives open/onClose props and Topbar receives onMenuClick. Clear separation of concerns.

Sidebar.jsx: correct Tailwind pattern `fixed lg:sticky` + `-translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0` + conditional `translate-x-0` when open. Overlay and close button are properly gated with `lg:hidden`. Each NavLink has `onClick={onClose}` so drawer auto-closes on nav — verified working.
Topbar.jsx: hamburger button uses `lg:hidden` so it disappears at 1024px+ as intended. Confirmed display:none on 1920px viewport.

DepotOrderDetailPage.jsx line card: `flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 sm:gap-4` correctly stacks on mobile (<640) and goes horizontal from sm+ (640+). Verified visually and via bounding-box math (pill_top >= desc_bottom on mobile; pill_left >= desc_right on tablet/desktop).

Nit: the Tailwind `lg` breakpoint is 1024px, so at exactly 768px (iPad portrait) the sidebar is still an off-canvas drawer. This matches the requirement ('sidebar is statically visible on lg+'), and the hamburger button provides the toggle. If a designer wants iPad-portrait to also have the static sidebar, they'd need to switch to `md:` breakpoints, but the current spec is `lg:` and it's implemented consistently.
Pre-existing DialogContent aria-describedby warnings remain (cosmetic console noise, no UX impact) — same nit as iterations 2 and 3.
seed_data_creation: Used existing depot order CMD 56747 (id 6a5b2ed1e41c4c0d537c50ff, 180 lines). Tapped first pill once (0/2 -> 1/2) as functional verification — this is a minor persistent state change but does not affect other tests. Can be reset by main agent if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 (mobile/tablet responsive layout) is fully green. The whole app is usable on phone (390px) and tablet (768px). Sidebar becomes an off-canvas drawer on <lg with proper hamburger toggle, overlay, X button, and auto-close on nav. Depot order detail lines now stack pill below description on mobile (critical bug from user's screenshot verified fixed). Tables inside list pages scroll horizontally in overflow-x-auto wrappers. All form pages use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 for responsive input columns. Desktop layout unchanged (regression clean). Existing test artifacts from iterations 1-3 still apply — no backend changes were made, so pytest/backend_test.py is still 43/43 passing from iteration 3.
rca of the issue: The originally reported bug — pick pill covering description text on mobile — was caused by the line-card row being `flex items-center justify-between` (unconditionally horizontal), so on a narrow 390px viewport the fixed-width pill sat on top of the wrapped description text. Fix applied in DepotOrderDetailPage.jsx line 108: `flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 sm:gap-4`. On <640px this becomes vertical (pill under description), on sm+ it goes back to the original horizontal side-by-side layout. Confirmed via bounding-box measurements at 390/768/1920 and via visual screenshots.
